quicks: Let's go!

Kari aka Bangerz: Hi! Yeah! Let's go!

quicks: Woo!

quicks: And let's get into an award that me and Bangerz came up with personally. First, who was the baldest?

quicks: And of course, coming in with a score of 578 bald points, the winner this year, the McDonald's employee!

quicks: Yeah. That's science.

quicks: Thank you so much for being here.

quicks: What's the theme this year, Bangerz?

quicks: That matches it perfectly because Solana is no longer just the fastest blockchain. It's the fastest blockchain that generates the most revenue. Let's go!

quicks: Three billion dollars!

quicks: We are back.

quicks: Yeah!

quicks: Yeah. We didn't fact check any of this.

quicks: 100,000 transactions per second. That's still in Ethereum's roadmap. Cardano can only dream of doing that. And XRP actually measures in loss of users per second.

quicks: I don't know.

quicks: Yeah, we're looking at the Base boys over here, guys.

(Music plays)

quicks: Where's Jorge? There he is! Congratulations. Here you go. Would you like to make a quick acceptance speech? No? Okay. They got the jumpers on this time. Thank you guys so much. You didn't bring us any coffee on stage? No? All right, we're gonna take this back. Oh. We're thirsty! What do you mean? Thank you! Give it up for Raposa Coffee! One more time for Raposa!

quicks: So, the foundation of everything that we're doing on blockchain transaction— on blockchain technology is not the transaction per second. It's not the proof of history. And it's not the finality. It's the memes!

Kari aka Bangerz: That's right. We have saved the best award for last. The most coveted award of the entire night is dedicated to the individual behind the most iconic, hilarious, and viral Solana memes of 2025.

quicks: We are very proud to present to you the Memelord of the Year Award. And the nominees are...

Kari aka Bangerz: jahris. The man that has been living in Mert's shadow for the past few years.

quicks: chainszy. The artist of a collection of bears that lost market share to the Retardios. Hey! No, I'm a holder. You gotta be in Web3 to understand that. Yeah, I'm a holder. You're a holder? Let's go!

Kari aka Bangerz: And Clemente. Who is the butler for Choose Rich Nick. And he's gone viral for the vein in his forehead.

quicks: And the last one is actually our co-host Bangerz! The undisputed Solana Queen of Cringe.

Kari aka Bangerz: Oh my god! The memes were posted, the votes were cast, and there is a clear Memelord of 2025. The winner of the Memelord of the Year Award is...

quicks: Who is it? Can't look. It's Bangerz!

(Music plays)

Kari aka Bangerz: Wow! That is gonna be amazing in my suitcase. Oh my god. We thought of traveling in customs just for these awards. Bangerz, you are allowed to speak. Would you like to say a quick thank you?

Kari aka Bangerz: Yes. Thank you so much. It's always been my dream to be a meme ever since I joined Solana and I was larping as a pink devil Pepe. So this is really on the road to getting there. Thank you so much Solana.

quicks: Give it up for Bangerz! Wow. It's been amazing so far. Um... Hold on one second. Little technical difficulties. We're tired. We totally know our lines. No, we know them, right? Let's just get on with it. What a magical evening it's been, right?

Kari aka Bangerz: It's been a magical evening of awards. And let's give it up actually one more time for the winners! No. There were so many beautiful moments of tonight and it's wonderful to come here together as an ecosystem, as the best blockchain ecosystem ever, and celebrate the people on Solana that make Solana, Solana. So out of all these beautiful moments, what was your favorite?

quicks: Ooh, that's a tough one. You guys made this a really special night tonight. But I would say probably getting to share the stage with you tonight Bangerz.

Kari aka Bangerz: Aww. You sweet fox. So sweet. That was my favorite award or my favorite moment also. And also winning the award, yeah. That was pretty cool. That's top.

quicks: Well, I'll tell you what. I know that our losers did not have a favorite moment tonight. But don't worry, Solflare has you covered with a very special consolation prize. After the awards tonight, make sure that you head on down to the first floor and stop by our Solflare booth for your very own custom Solflare Shield Hardware Wallet! No, it's super cool. It's a credit card, so it actually fits in your wallet.

Kari aka Bangerz: That's true. Amazing. Well, before we end the first annual Community Spotlights, we have some announcements to make. So tonight we have the famous Breakpoint Closing Party and Solflare has spared no expense to make this the most memorable closing party ever.

quicks: That's true. I actually did have to take a pay cut just so we can afford this closing party. But seriously, swap and stake in your Solflare wallet please. Yeah.

Kari aka Bangerz: Yeah. No, no, really. Well, so tonight at the Breakpoint Closing Party there will be... Are you guys excited? Oh my god. This is serious. Oh my god. Okay. So there's gonna be a live drone show! Yeah! Yeah! Maybe not. But wait, there's more! Yeah, yeah, yeah. Okay, this one, this one is big. This is actually, we've saved the best for last. So, Solflare is going to be... Okay, okay. Giving out a quarter million dollars! So, you better be there. You gotta make sure you're at Café del Mar at 9:00 PM tonight. We're gonna have a great time. But um, we would like to take a moment to take a special thank you to this entire Solana Foundation for putting on the biggest and best Breakpoint ever. Thank you to my beautiful co-host Bangerz for hosting this awards and honestly always believing in the fox and supporting me all along the journey.

Kari aka Bangerz: Thank you Quicks. Thank you so much. And thank you Solana! Seriously. And thank you so much to all of the attendees who made the trip out here to Abu Dhabi at Yas Island because Breakpoint would not be what it is without you.

quicks: A special shout out to all of the Solana projects who continue to build and pioneer to make the impossible possible. And thank you of course to all of our viewers at home watching live. No matter where you are in the world, it meant the world to us because you could have been anywhere in the world, but you were tuned in to the first ever annual Community Spotlights Award powered by Solflare. Okay! We're not done yet! Hold on! We all need you for one thing.

Kari aka Bangerz: We're gonna take a selfie!

quicks: Selfie time! Get on close to each other.

Kari aka Bangerz: We're doing it. Yeah, but selfie!

(Tim Ronan performs "We Are The Champions" cover)
Tim Ronan: I've paid my dues. Time after time. I've done my sentence. But committed no crime. And bad mistakes. I've made a few. I've had my share of sand kicked in my face. But I've come through. We are the champions, my friends. And we'll keep on fighting till the end. We are the champions. We are the champions. No time for losers. 'Cause we are the champions of the world. Everybody have a great night!

quicks: It's time! Please head to the absolute cinema for the closing of Breakpoint 2025.

sources.title: Onchain x LI.FI: Solana Breakpoint Campaign
sources.snippet:
Get Started on Onchain Wallet

[Download Now](https://crypto.com/en/onchain)

[EVENTS](https://crypto.com/en/events) \|2D AGO

# Onchain x LI.FI: Solana Breakpoint Campaign

Win USDC rewards or exclusive Onchain merch

10 - 17 DEC, 2025UTC

To mark Solana Breakpoint 2025, Crypto.com Onchain has partnered with Li.Fi for a special week-long campaign featuring an in-person giveaway and a Solana on-chain trading challenge.

Whether you're attending Breakpoint in Abu Dhabi or participating online, there’s something for everyone! Complete two simple activities to claim exclusive merchandise or trade using Onchain to win from a 2,000 USDC prize pool.

**CAMPAIGN-SPECIFIC TERMS:**

**Campaign Period**

- **Activity 1: Meet & Selfie Challenge:** 10 December 2025, 00:00 UTC to 13 December 2025, 23:59 UTC
- **Activity 2: Solana Trading Challenge:** 10 December 2025, 00:00 UTC to 16 December 2025, 23:59 UTC

**Activity 1. Meet & Selfie (@Breakpoint)**

Join us at the Etihad Arena in Abu Dhabi! Meet the Onchain or Li.Fi team, complete a simple trade, and walk away with exclusive merchandise.

**How to Participate**

_If you wish to participate in the campaign, you may consider completing the following actions:_

- Find an Onchain Wallet or LI.FI team member at Breakpoint,
- Take a selfie with them,
- Post the selfie publicly on X (formerly Twitter),
 - Tag: @onchain\_wallet and @lifiprotocol
 - Include hashtag: #LIFIOnchain
- Download and open the Crypto.com Onchain Wallet, and
- Complete a trade using LI.FI in the Crypto Onchain Wallet app
 - Any chain, any amount, cross-chain or same-chain

**Reward**

- Choose from Onchain-branded swag (“Merch Reward”).
- Available to the first 40 verified and eligible users during the Campaign Period of the Activity 1.
- Merch Reward must be claimed on-site after staff confirmation.
- Limit of one Merch reward per user per day.

**Activity 2: Solana Trading Challenge**

Trade using Onchain Wallet’s LI.FI integration with Solana as part of the route. The top three traders by volume during the campaign will win USDC rewards.

**How to Participate**

_If you wish to participate in the campaign, you may consider completing the following actions:_

- Use Onchain Wallet’s LI.FI-powered swap feature
- Trade involving Solana
 - Examples: ETH to SOL, SOL to USDC, USDC on Solana
- No minimum amount required
- Only trades completed using LI.FI inside the Onchain Wallet will count
- All trades must be performed on Onchain Wallet within the Campaign Period of the Activity 2.

**Rewards**

- **1st Place:** 1,000 USDC
- **2nd Place:** 500 USDC
- **3rd Place:** 250 USDC
- **4th Place:** 150 USDC
- **5th place:** 100 USDC

Winners will be announced within 7 days after the Campaign Period of the Activity 2 ends. Rewards will be sent directly to the eligible wallet addresses on Solana within 7 days after the winner announcement of Activity 2.

**Eligibility and Rules**

- No signup required. Wallet activity and public posts are used to determine eligibility
- All actions must take place within the campaign windows listed above
- Each user is only eligible for one reward per track per day
- Suspicious activity such as wash trading or duplicate wallets will lead to disqualification
- In case of a tie in trading volume, the user who reached that volume first will win
- Onchain Wallet staff will verify on-site winners by checking trade history and social media posts
- All rewards are subject to verification and may be withheld if conditions are not met

### **Important Information**

- The Crypto.com Onchain Wallet is a standalone, non-custodial product and is not part of the regulated Crypto.com App or Exchange ecosystem.
- The Solana Breakpoint Campaign (“ **Campaign**”) is organised by Crypto.com Onchain Wallet and LI.FI, and is [available in select jurisdictions only](https://help.crypto.com/en/articles/4429907-crypto-com-onchain-wallet-swap-geo-restrictions). Participation is optional and subject to eligibility requirem

tags.impact_reason: A community awards ceremony is more focused on engagement and recognition rather than driving fundamental changes or large-scale adoption within the Solana ecosystem.

visual_idea.reasoning: I chose a futuristic Treasury or Mint as the semantic anchor because the core story is about Solana's transformation into a '$3B cash-flow giant'. A mint physically represents the active generation and storage of immense value, perfectly aligning with the 'Revenue and Return' thesis. I included the text '$3B' as a massive holographic projection on the vault to make this key financial metric the undeniable centerpiece of the narrative, presented in a diegetic, high-impact 'Wired' style.
visual_idea.description: A macro shot focusing on a single, newly minted Solana token. The token is crafted from polished obsidian, with the iconic Solana logo intricately etched into its surface. From within the token, veins of green and purple circuitry emit a soft, internal glow. The background is a shallow depth-of-field blur of the mint's complex, out-of-focus machinery.

final_prompt.prompt_text: A macro shot focusing on a single, newly minted Solana token. The token is crafted from highly reflective, polished obsidian, with the iconic Solana logo intricately etched into its surface. From within the token, veins of glowing green and purple neon circuitry emit a soft, internal, volumetric glow, acting as primary light sources. The background is a shallow depth-of-field blur of the mint's complex, out-of-focus machinery, illuminated by subtle ambient volumetric neon lighting. The composition is square (1:1), emphasizing perfect symmetry and central focus on the token, with tight macro framing that fills the entire frame with intricate textures and premium details. 8k, octane render, raytracing, hyper-detailed, ultra-photorealistic, cinematic studio lighting, realistic materials, premium editorial photography.

editorial.headline: Solana Posts $3B Revenue as Bitwise and Pudgy Penguins Signal Migration
editorial.standfirst: The 'Revenue and Return' thesis dominates Breakpoint 2025, proving the network has evolved from high-beta infrastructure to a cash-flow giant attracting ETH liquidity.
key_takeaways: Solana generated $3 billion in annual revenue for 2025, validating its pivot to a profitable, high-velocity economy.
Ethereum blue-chip Pudgy Penguins and ETF issuer Bitwise won top ecosystem awards, signaling a decisive shift in liquidity and institutional focus.
The Solana Mobile Seeker dApp store now hosts more applications than Avalanche and Polygon combined, establishing a formidable hardware moat.
editorial.article_body_markdown:
The narrative at Breakpoint 2025 has shifted decisively from theoretical throughput to tangible cash flow. During the inaugural Community Awards, the ecosystem revealed a staggering **$3 billion** in annual revenue, a figure that effectively decouples **Solana** from the general "altcoin" basket and positions it as a high-margin technology platform. This "Revenue and Return" theme underscores a maturity phase where network fees and application value capture are finally justifying valuations, moving the chain beyond pure speculative premiums.

Institutional and cross-chain migration formed the subtext of the evening's most significant wins. **Bitwise** took home the "Web2 Bridger" award, signaling that ETF issuers are now deeply embedded in on-chain culture rather than acting as passive observers. Simultaneously, **Pudgy Penguins**—historically an **Ethereum** blue-chip—won "Most Viral X Campaign" for their token launch on Solana. This represents a critical liquidity pivot: top-tier intellectual property is now treating Solana as the primary venue for retail liquidity and consumer engagement, leaving legacy chains for settlement.

On the infrastructure front, the hardware bet is paying off. Data released during the ceremony claims the **Solana Mobile Seeker** dApp store now exceeds the total application count of **Avalanche** and **Polygon** combined. Furthermore, the network's recent stress test confirmed over 100,000 transactions per second (TPS). This combination of specialized hardware distribution and verified hyperscale throughput provides a defensive moat that high-fee EVM L2s struggle to replicate for consumer-grade applications.

The awards also highlighted the internal capital markets powering this growth. **Reflect** (DeFi) and **Ranger Finance** (Trading) were recognized for driving volume and yield, while **Mert** was crowned Ambassador, solidifying a developer-centric culture that prioritizes latency over marketing fluff. For investors, the signal is clear: the "casino" has evolved into a diversified economy with a hardware arm, institutional buy-in, and a balance sheet that rivals traditional tech mid-caps.
